meta.title: Prosperify - Verifiable document intelligence for sensitive data
meta.description: Query sensitive corpora with sourced answers, governed access and deployment modes adapted to your perimeter.

hero.subtitle: Prosperify helps teams find, compare and verify information across sensitive corpora, with visible sources, governed access and a clear trust perimeter.

stats.sources: PDF, Word, Excel, CSV, JSON and business corpora

workflow.title: Verifiable answers
workflow.subtitle: A simple sequence: approved sources, scoped access, verifiable answers.

create.title: Connect
create.heading: Prepare only approved sources
create.subtitle: KYC files, due-diligence reports and sanctions lists — indexed into dedicated stores.

unify.title: Scope
unify.subtitle: The agent fans the query out across your KYC stores and returns a cited result, down to the exact source.
unify.heading: One question, one sourced and traceable answer
unify.formatsInfo: PDF, Word, Excel, CSV, JSON, reports, contracts...
unify.policyNote: Segmentation happens at assistant level: corpus, mission and limits are defined before use.

chat.assistantName: Every access is logged and governed

meeting.heading: Schedule a working session
meeting.description: Prefer a live discussion? Open a pre-filled Google Calendar event with Prosperify already added as a guest.
meeting.note: When you save or send the event, Prosperify is included on the invitation. Add Google Meet from the calendar event before sending if it is not enabled by default.
meeting.title: Prosperify deployment discussion
meeting.details: Discuss document scope, security requirements, deployment model and next steps with Prosperify.

products.subtitle: Three deployment modes to match the right level of control, integration and operations.

offers.title: Hybrid
features: Your data stays on your infrastructure
AI model hosted and maintained by us

precision.title: Sourced and reviewable answers
precision.subtitle: Sentence-level citations
precision.description: Each answer keeps the link to the excerpts used so teams can review, audit and validate results against the source material.

coverage.title: Hybrid search across document corpora
coverage.subtitle: Semantic, lexical, visual and contextual
coverage.description: Prosperify combines semantic search, keywords, document context and visual signals to retrieve useful passages across heterogeneous corpora.

performance.title: Synthesis framed by your sources
performance.subtitle: Search, compare, extract
performance.description: Prosperify Agent helps teams summarize, compare clauses and extract key information from your document stores.

governance.title: Access controlled by role and store
governance.subtitle: Each user in the right perimeter
governance.description: Access can be limited by role, team, confidentiality level, store or authorized corpus.

orchestration.title: A review workflow for business teams
orchestration.subtitle: Search, answer, verify
orchestration.description: Prosperify keeps retrieved passages, citations and answer context visible so teams can review important answers before using them.

differentiation.title: Data sovereignty
differentiation.subtitle: Data in a defined trust perimeter
differentiation.description: Dedicated, hybrid or local deployment, with data isolation and no training of general models on client corpora.

local.title: Local deployment
local.line2: Documents and operations inside your perimeter

mainCard.description: Each client gets an isolated perimeter for documents, stores, permissions and usage traces.

cloud.title: Dedicated instance
cloud.description: Each organization runs in its own environment, separating data, processing and sensitive operations.

encryption.title: Key management system
encryption.description: Key management protects documents and metadata stored in the data layer.

kubernetes.title: Controlled access
kubernetes.description: Access is limited by role, store, corpus and usage so each team stays within its perimeter.

dataProtection.title: Monitoring and audit
dataProtection.description: Operational signals help understand usage, diagnose incidents and review sourced answers.

supervision.title: Deployment matched to your perimeter
supervision.description: Dedicated cloud, hybrid or local: the selected mode aligns with confidentiality and operating requirements.

integration.subtitle: Prosperify can be introduced progressively on top of existing sources so authorized corpora become queryable, governed and reviewable.

steps.title: Scoping
steps.description: Clarify the use case, identify the corpus and frame access rules.

steps.title: Pilot ingestion
steps.description: Prepare documents, make sources retrievable and test first queries.

steps.title: Configuration
steps.description: Configure pilot users, verify access and prepare scenarios.

steps.title: Business validation
steps.description: Review answer quality, identify limits and decide next steps.

steps.title: Production and extension
steps.description: Track usage, supervise operations and define the expansion path.

architecture.subtitle: A clear chain for moving from sensitive documents to sourced, reviewable and controllable answers.
architecture.footerNote: Sources, access and verification kept at every step

technical.title: A readable chain built for
technical.subtitle: From added document to cited answer, each step preserves the link back to the source.
technical.footnote: Sources, access and verification preserved at each step

ingest.title: Authorized corpus
ingest.body: Documents and metadata enter a defined perimeter before use.

parse.title: Preparation
parse.body: Text, tables and pages are prepared while preserving useful context.

embed.title: Indexing
embed.body: Passages are chunked and indexed for hybrid search.

retrieve.title: Hybrid search
retrieve.body: Semantic and lexical retrieval work together to find useful passages.

cite.title: Citations
cite.body: Claims stay tied to reviewable excerpts.

verify.title: Review
verify.body: Sources, access and quality signals remain available for human review.

faq.subtitle: Key answers about sources, security, deployment and document governance with Prosperify.

items.question: Does the AI continuously learn from my data?
items.answer: No. Client corpora are not used to train general models. They are used to generate sourced answers inside the agreed project perimeter.

items.question: Where are documents hosted?
items.answer: It depends on the selected model: dedicated cloud, hybrid architecture or local deployment. The trust perimeter is defined with the client around security, confidentiality and operational constraints.

items.question: Does Prosperify replace experts?
items.answer: No. Prosperify helps automate document search, synthesis, extraction and comparison. Decisions, validation and interpretation remain with business experts.

items.question: How are answers verified?
items.answer: Answers are generated from selected document excerpts and linked back to the sources used. Insufficiently supported statements can be surfaced to support human review.

items.question: Can access be limited by role, store or corpus?
items.answer: Yes. Access can be governed by role, store, corpus, user or confidentiality level. Out-of-scope operations are refused according to configured rules.

items.question: Do we need to rebuild the information system?
items.answer: No. Prosperify can be added as a document intelligence layer on top of existing systems. Integration can start with one corpus, one store and one business use case before expanding.

items.question: Which formats are supported?
items.answer: Prosperify is designed for structured and unstructured documents, including PDF, Word, Excel, CSV, JSON and other business corpora depending on project scope.

items.question: Which deployment modes are possible?
items.answer: Three approaches are possible: dedicated cloud, hybrid or local. The choice depends on confidentiality level, infrastructure constraints and sovereignty needs.

team.subtitle: A focused product and engineering team building document AI for organizations that work with sensitive information.

jobs.subtitle: Open roles and hiring updates from Prosperify. We keep the team small, technical, and close to real customer problems.
jobs.emptyDescription: We are not hiring for a specific seat today, but strong infrastructure, product, and applied AI profiles can still reach out.

footer.tagline: Query your documents with verifiable answers.
